name: Nutty Irishman Coffee
directions: Fill cup with (6 oz.) coffee.
Add (1oz.) Baileys.
Add (1oz.) Frangelico.
Top with whipped cream.

similar.name: Nutty Irishman Coffee With a Kick!!!!

name: Boston Cream Pie Martini
directions: mix and chill for 30 minute.

name: Sweet Chocolate Raspberry Martini
directions: Place rim of chilled glass into rasperry preserves.
Fill a cocktail shaker with ice. Add the chocolate liqueur, raspberry preserves and vodka to the shaker.
Shake briskly to mix and chill.
Strain into the martini glass. Garnish with the chocolate.

name: Saharan Martini
directions: Add all ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled with ice and shake for about 30 seconds.
Strain into martini glass and sprinkle chocolate curls on top.

name: Nutty Irishman Coffee With a Kick!!!!
directions: Fill large coffee mug with
Baileys, Frangelico and Kaluha top with coffee.
Garnish with whipped cream and sprinkle with cinnamon.

name: Caramel Delight
directions: Coat the rim of two chilled martini glasses with caramel dip into cinnamon and sugar mixture then drizzle the caramel and chocolate inside the glass.
In a shaker add the first 3 ingredients with a 12 of ice cubes. Give a really good shake.
Pour into prepared glasses with or without ice.
Enjoy!

name: Amarula Mint Cream
directions: Mix all the ingredients together in a blender with crushed ice.

name: African Raspberry
directions: Serve over ice and enjoy.

name: Madagascar Vanilla Martini
directions: Combine ingredient in a martini shaker filled with ice and shake vigorously.
Pour into a martini glass and garnish with a cherry. Glass can be rimmed with butterscotch sauce.

name: Fruit and Nuts With Cream
directions: Dip the rim of a liqueur glass in caramel syrup.
Layer the ingredients in the order listed.
Using the back of a spoon to pour over each layer will give you good results.

name: White Chocolate Raspberry Truffle
directions: Pour liqueurs over ice.
Stir.
Cheers!

name: Oatmeal Cookie Cocktail
directions: Add a scoop of ice to your shaker.
Add ingredients.
Shake & strain into a glass of ice rimmed with cinnamon.

name: Buttery Bailey's Nog
directions: Pour ingredients into glass.
Stir.
May add ice or whip cream if you like.
Enjoy!

name: Skor Bar
directions: Mix ingredients in an 8 oz. shaker and shake well.
Serve.

name: Lifesaver a Layered Shot
directions: Dip the rim into caramel topping. Layer each of these into a shot glass in the order given.
The secret is to pour slowly, barely dribble the liqueurs into your glass.

Start with your first liqueur and pour it into your glass, now take your spoon and place the tip of the spoon very close to your first liqueur, now carefully and slowly pour in your second liqueur over the back of the spoon and into the glass topping with cream.

similar.name: Cookies and Cream a Layered Shot!

name: Irish Flag Layered Shot
directions: Layer in a pony glass or shot glass in the order given.
The secret is to pour slowly, barely dribble the liqueurs into your glass.

Start with your first liqueur and pour it into your glass, now take your spoon and place the tip of the spoon very close to your first liqueur, now carefully and slowly pour in your second liqueur over the back of the spoon and into the glass, then your third.

similar.name: Nutty Irishman Coffee With a Kick!!!!

name: Irish Monk: Layered Shot
directions: Layer in a pony glass or shot glass in the order given.
The secret is to pour slowly, barely dribble the liqueurs into your glass.

Start with your first liqueur and pour it into your glass, now take your spoon and place the tip of the spoon very close to your first liqueur, now carefully and slowly pour in your second liqueur over the back of the spoon and into the glass, then your third.

similar.name: Cookies and Cream a Layered Shot!

name: Irish Sunset/Sunrise
directions: Layer in a shot glass in the order given.
The secret is to pour slowly, barely dribble the liqueurs into your glass.

Start with your first liqueur and pour it into your glass, now take your spoon and place the tip of the spoon very close to your first liqueur, now carefully and slowly pour in your second liqueur over the back of the spoon and into the glass, then your third.

similar.name: Nutty Irishman Coffee With a Kick!!!!

name: Passion Martini
directions: Pour all ingredients into a martini shaker full of ice.  Shake vigorously and strain into a chilled martini glass.  Enjoy!

name: Cookies and Cream a Layered Shot!
directions: Place chocolate and caramel on to a plate swirl them together.
Dip the rim of the glass into chocolate and caramel topping.
Layer each of these into a shot glass in the order given.
The secret is to pour slowly, barely dribble the liqueurs into your glass.

Start with your first liqueur and pour it into your glass, now take your spoon and place the tip of the spoon very close to your first liqueur, now carefully and slowly pour in your second liqueur over the BACK of the spoon and into the glass topping with cream.

name: Chocolate Milk Shake
directions: Fill a pint glass full of ice. Transfer ice into blender and add a couple extra cubes more.
Add all liquors and blend until smooth and looks like a milkshake. Pour back into pint glass.
Garnish with whipped cream and a cherry.

name: Nuts and Berries Cocktail
directions: Fill metal shaker with ice and add all ingredients. Shake until outside of the shaker is frosty. Strain into a snifter. For garnish you can add a little whipped cream and drizzle a little chambord over the top.
Perfect drink for a dessert. It tastes a lot like a milkshake though so be careful -- they go down quick!

name: Amarula Colada
directions: Blend all ingredients with crushed ice and pour into a tall cocktail glass.
Garnish with pineapple slice and cherry.

name: Amalyser
directions: Shake ingredients and strain into a tall glass filled with ice.
Top up with coke.

name: Landslide
directions: Layer the ingredients in the shot glass in the following order: Crème de Bananes, Disaronno Amaretto, Amarula Cream.
Enjoy!  ;).

name: Pralines and Cream Cocktail
directions: Add all ingredients expect the pecans into a blender and blend until smooth.
Pour into a snifter and garnish with a dollop of whipped cream and pecan pieces.
Serve with a straw and a spoon. They're quite thick.

name: Amarula Delight
directions: Add Amarula and Frangelico into a shaker with ice and shake about 15 times.
Strain into a champagne flutes or martini glass.
Take a sharp knife and make a small slit into the truffle and press onto the rim off the glass.

name: Tokyo Tea
directions: Fill pint or tall glass with ice, add vodka, gin, rum, midori and sweet and sour. Stir with cockail stirrer and float 1/2 7-up on top. Garnish with lemon, lime and cherry.
I think they look really cute with little umbrellas.

name: Absolut Iced Tea
directions: Fill pint or any large 16 oz glass full of ice. Add vodkas, triple sec, sweet & sour and cola.
Lightly stir with a cocktail stirrer or straw.
Garnish with lemon, lime and maraschino cherry.

name: The Homecoming
directions: Pour the first 3 ingredients into a flute (watch the bubbles on the champagne) and add raspberries (they act as ice).

name: Cookies & Cream Cocktail
directions: Add milk, ice cream, Baileys and Kahlua to crushed cookies and blend until well combined.
DRIZZLE honey on the inside of two cocktail glasses. Pour cocktail into each glass and serve garnished with strawberries.

name: Spicy Sparkling Cider (Cocktail)
directions: Combined sugar and cinnamon well. Wet glass with lemon or lime juice and dip rim into cinnamon sugar mixture.
Fill highball or chimney glass with ice. Add spiced rum, dark rum. Add sparkling cider to the top.
May also be made in large wine glasses (chill rums and cider first and don't add any ice).

name: Cherry Bomb Martini !
directions: In a cocktail shaker filled with ice add the ingredients and shake till well chilled.
Pour into a martini glass with or without the ice.

name: Wedding Cake Martini II
directions: Pour all ingredients into a shaker over ice. (orange juice and pineapple juice are just a splash each).
Shake well.
Strain into a well chilled martini glass.
Enjoy! (no smashing into your partners face!).

name: Shark Bite
directions: Fill a tall highball or pint glass with ice.
Add Captain, blue curacao, sour and lime juice.
Stir with cocktail stirrer or straw.
Add dash of grenadine to make blood in blue water effect.
Serve.

name: Mardi Gras Hurricane 2
directions: Fill a 16 ounce glass with ice.
Pour in amaretto, light rum and dark rum.
Pour in orange juice, pineapple juice, and lemon juice.
Stir, then top with a dash of grenadine and garnish with an orange slice and a cherry.

name: Pink Mermaid
directions: Place cream, vodka, crème de almond, and ice cubes in a blender.  Process until the ice is completely crushed and mixture is frothy and light pink.  Pour into a glass and top with brandy.

name: Apple Pie and Iced Cream
directions: Shake all ingredients with ice and stain into chilled Martini glass with cinnamon-sugar rim.
Garnish with an apple slice.

name: Strawberry Fetish Cocktail
directions: Shake all ingredients (except lemonade and soda) and strain into a collins glass filled with broken ice. Add lemonade and soda, garnish with a strawberry, and serve.

name: After Eight Shooter
directions: Carefully layer the tia maria, creme-de-menthe, and bailey's irish cream, in that order, into a sherry glass, ensuring they don't mix.

name: Pink Sunset Cocktail
directions: Fill cocktail shaker half full with ice. Add first 5 ingredients to shaker. Shake very well. Pour into a hurricane glass and garnish with a maraschino cherry and pineapple slice.

name: Chocolate Covered Cherry Martini
directions: Fill a shaker with ice cubes.

Pour in the chocolate and cherry vodkas, grenadine, creme de cocao, half-and-half, and chocolate syrup. Cover and shake until the outside of the shaker has frosted. Strain into a chilled martini glass, garnish with maraschino cherry and the chocolate kiss, and serve.

name: Want S'more Martinis?
directions: Dip the rim of the glass in the chocolate syrup and then in the crushed graham crackers (as you would a margarita with salt). Chill in the freezer.
Pour all alcohol and heavy cream in a shaker with ice and shake until well blended. Strain into chilled martini glass.
Add the toasted marshmallows as garnish! YUM!

name: Irish Whiskey Cream Liqueur Coffee
directions: Make the espresso and pour in the liqueur. Stir in the sugar.
Pour in the hot milk, sprinkle over the ground spices and serve at once.

similar.name: Nutty Irishman Coffee With a Kick!!!!

name: Pama and Circumstance
directions: Shake all ingredients together in a shakerof ice.
Pour into a martini glass rimmed with sugar and garnish with a slice of star fruit and a mint sprig ( if you like).
ENJOY!

name: Coffee Ice Cream Soda, Hold the Soda!
directions: Use two 16 ounce mugs or glasses for this treat.
Pour 8 ounces of coffee in each glass.
Stir in 2 tablespoons of non-dairy creamer in each glass.
Stir 1 tablespoon chocolate syrup in each glass.
Add 4 ounces of ice cream to each glass.
Top with whip cream (optional).
Makes two 16 ounce drinks. Enjoy!

name: The Love Potion
directions: Combine liquors and ice in a cocktail shaker. Shake until the shaker is well-covered in condensation. Serve on the rocks, or up in a martini glass. Garnish with cranberries or raspberries.

name: Malibu Punch
directions: Mix all and serve over ice.
Garnish with Oranfge juice and/ or Cherry.

name: Chocolatey Irish Coffee
directions: Pour all of the ingredients into your favourite mug, stir and enjoy!

similar.name: Nutty Irishman Coffee With a Kick!!!!

name: Liquid Mari-Jane
directions: Add Melon Liqueur, Blue Curacao, Peach Schnapps, Coconut Rum, and Southern Comfort to ice in Shaker. Pour in Orange Juice and Pineapple Juice. Squeeze Lime wedge.
Shake until well mixed. Should come out as an Herbal Green color.
Pour into Pint Glass.
Garnish with Lime and Cherry.
Enjoy Responsibly.

name: Chocolate Caramel Martini
directions: Swirl Somebody's Mother's Caramel Sauce around the inside rim of a martini glass.
Fill shaker with ice. Pour in ingredients.
Shake well and pour into the martini glass.
If done correctly, it should taste like an adult milkshake.
A little whipped cream on top never hurt anyone either!

name: Whoopie Pie Martini
directions: Combine ingredients in a shaker with ice.
Shake and strain into a martini glass to serve.

name: Cake Batter Martini
directions: Combine ingredients in a shaker with ice.
Shake and strain into a martini glass.
Garnish with whipped cream and white chocolate shavings.

name: Purple Dream
directions: Pour ingredients into a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake until completely cold then strain into a chilled stemmed glass or a rocks glass filled with ice.
